parameters.query: SELECT fi.*, i.description, i.severity, ST_Y(i.location::geometry) AS lat, ST_X(i.location::geometry) AS lng FROM elijah_fire_incident fi JOIN elijah_incident i ON i.id = fi.incident_id WHERE fi.id = '={{ $json.body.fire_incident_id }}'

SELECT wp.name, wp.type, wp.status, wp.capacity_litres, ST_Distance(wp.location, ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint({{ $json.lng }}, {{ $json.lat }}), 4326)::geography) AS distance_m FROM elijah_fire_water_point wp WHERE wp.organization_id = '={{ $json.body.organization_id }}' AND wp.status != 'empty' ORDER BY distance_m LIMIT 3

SELECT f.name, f.owner_name, f.owner_phone, f.access_code, f.access_notes, ST_Y(f.access_gate_location::geometry) AS gate_lat, ST_X(f.access_gate_location::geometry) AS gate_lng FROM elijah_fire_farm f WHERE f.id = '={{ $json.farm_id }}' AND f.id IS NOT NULL

SELECT g.id AS group_id, g.name AS group_name, g.type, g.contact_phone, gm.member_id, m.phone AS leader_phone, m.display_name AS leader_name FROM elijah_fire_responder_group g JOIN elijah_fire_responder_group_member gm ON gm.group_id = g.id JOIN elijah_member m ON m.id = gm.member_id WHERE g.organization_id = '={{ $json.body.organization_id }}' AND gm.role = 'leader' AND m.phone IS NOT NULL

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ messaging_product: 'whatsapp', to: $json.phone, type: 'text', text: { body: $json.message } }) }}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO elijah_fire_incident_group_dispatch (fire_incident_id, group_id, dispatched_by) VALUES ('={{ $json.body.fire_incident_id }}', '={{ $json.group_id }}', '={{ $json.body.dispatched_by }}')
